label: DE.CM-03
definition: Personnel activity and technology usage are monitored to find potentially adverse events

label: PR.AA-01
definition: Identities and credentials for authorized users, services, and hardware are managed by the organization

label: PR.AA-02
definition: Identities are proofed and bound to credentials based on the context of interactions

label: PR.AA-03
definition: Users, services, and hardware are authenticated

label: PR.AA-04
definition: Identity assertions are protected, conveyed, and verified

label: PR.AA-05
definition: Access permissions, entitlements, and authorizations are defined in a policy, managed, enforced, and reviewed, and incorporate the principles of least privilege and separation of duties
